title: MV3 keepalive prevents service worker suspension
description: Verify the offscreen document keepalive prevents service worker termination during idle periods

steps.action: Connect to establish an active WebSocket session
steps.expected: Offscreen document created (check chrome://extensions for active offscreen)

steps.action: Wait 60 seconds with no CDP commands
steps.expected: Service worker remains active (not terminated), WebSocket still connected

steps.action: Verify keepalive messages in service worker console
Reconnect — verify no duplicate offscreen documents
